# Jesus Delgado

> Python Developer and AI Engineer specializing in machine learning, deep learning,
> computer vision, and production web systems.
> Based in Colombia. Available for projects in Colombia, Venezuela, and the United States.

Updated: 2026-04-12
License: RSL-1.0

## About
Jesus Delgado (Ing. Jesus Delgado) is a systems engineer based in Colombia,
specializing in backend development with Python and Django, web applications with Next.js,
mobile applications with React Native and Expo, artificial intelligence systems with
LangChain, and deployments on AWS and Docker. He has delivered projects in Colombia,
Venezuela, and the United States.

## Specialties
- Machine Learning and Deep Learning with Python
- Computer Vision and facial recognition systems
- Backend APIs with Django and Django REST Framework
- Web applications with Next.js and React
- Mobile applications with React Native and Expo
- AI-first development with LangChain
- Cloud deployments on AWS, Docker, PostgreSQL

## Active Stack
Python, Django, Django REST, React, Next.js, React Native, Expo, LangChain,
AWS, Docker, PostgreSQL, JWT

## Projects
- Colombia: https://devjesusdelgado.com/projects/colombia-digital-platforms
- Venezuela: https://devjesusdelgado.com/projects/venezuela-ai-backend-systems
- USA: https://devjesusdelgado.com/projects/usa-cloud-ai-products

## Contact
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/gotzellll

- X: https://x.com/_GodZell

---

# Jesus Delgado (Español)

> Python Developer y AI Engineer especializado en machine learning, deep learning,
> computer vision y sistemas web de producción.
> Con base en Colombia. Disponible para proyectos en Colombia, Venezuela y Estados Unidos.

## Sobre mí
Jesus Delgado (Ing. Jesus Delgado) es ingeniero de software con base en Colombia,
especializado en desarrollo backend con Python y Django, aplicaciones web con Next.js,
aplicaciones móviles con React Native y Expo, sistemas de inteligencia artificial con
LangChain, y despliegues en AWS y Docker. Ha desarrollado proyectos en Colombia,
Venezuela y Estados Unidos.

## Especialidades
- Machine Learning y Deep Learning con Python
- Computer Vision y reconocimiento facial
- APIs backend con Django y Django REST Framework
- Aplicaciones web con Next.js y React
- Aplicaciones móviles con React Native y Expo
- Desarrollo AI-first con LangChain
- Despliegues en AWS, Docker, PostgreSQL

## Stack Activo
Python, Django, Django REST, React, Next.js, React Native, Expo, LangChain,
AWS, Docker, PostgreSQL, JWT
